title: StandardOperatingProcedure
description: Blueprint schema for a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Extends base_document.schema.json. Maps to Schema.org/HowTo with a custom internal type overlay. SOPs describe a repeatable, step-by-step process for a routine or regulated task.

x-firestore.note: Extends base_document fields. All base_document required fields apply here.

prerequisites.description: Conditions, training, or certifications that must be met before executing this SOP. Schema.org: requirements.

safetyRequirements.description: PPE, lockout/tagout, permits, or other safety controls required before beginning. These must be acknowledged before execution.

standard.description: Applicable safety standard or regulation (e.g. 'OSHA 29 CFR 1910.147').

supplies.description: Materials and consumables required to perform this SOP. Schema.org: supply (HowToSupply).

tools.description: Equipment and tools required to perform this SOP. Schema.org: tool (HowToTool).

specification.description: Size, rating, or model spec (e.g. 'Torque wrench 50–150 ft-lbs').

steps.description: The ordered sequence of actions to perform. Schema.org: step (HowToStep). Steps may be nested into sections.

stepNumber.description: Display number or code (e.g. '1', '1.1', '2a'). Supports hierarchical numbering.

name.description: Short title for the step. Schema.org: HowToStep.name.

instructions.description: Full, detailed instructions for this step. Written in active imperative voice. Schema.org: HowToStep.text.

image.description: URL or Storage path to a supporting image or diagram for this step.

criticalStep.description: Flag if this step has a safety-critical or quality-critical consequence if missed.

holdPoint.description: Flag if execution must pause here for a sign-off, inspection, or test before proceeding.

holdPointApprover.description: Role required to sign off at this hold point (e.g. 'Quality Inspector', 'Shift Supervisor').

estimatedDuration.description: Expected time for this step (ISO 8601 duration, e.g. 'PT15M' for 15 minutes).

notes.description: Cautions, warnings, or additional context for this step.

totalTime.description: Estimated total time to complete the full SOP (ISO 8601 duration, e.g. 'PT2H30M'). Schema.org: totalTime.

frequency.description: How often this SOP is performed (e.g. 'Daily', 'Weekly', 'On-Demand', 'Post-Incident').

verificationMethod.description: How successful completion is verified or measured.

completionSignOff.description: Who is required to sign off on completion of this SOP.

twoPersonIntegrity.description: Set true if two independent sign-offs are required.
